positive: Stylized minimalist scene of a vibrant, neon-outlined jungle flora array (large monstera leaves, exotic ferns, hanging vines) forming a cohesive, symmetrical pattern. The style is high-contrast vector art meets vaporwave aesthetic, rendered with clean, bold lines and saturated electric color palette (cyan, magenta, lime green, deep indigo). Composition should feature a strong central focal point and repeat motif suitable for apparel textile print. Use flat design principles with hard edges, giving the effect of negative space defining the shapes. Dramatic backlighting emphasizing clean silhouettes and graphic appeal. UHD, print-ready, scalable, graphic design.
